who: sales operations team at a marketing agency
offer: For sales operations teams at marketing agencies processing 5–15 travel bookings/month, inefficient travel booking causes missed client meetings. We automate scheduling and booking instead of manual scheduling and booking through various platforms.
problem: Inefficient travel booking processes lead to wasted time and missed opportunities.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for sales operations help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to sales operations teams with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and solutions
try_it: Let users try simple interface for inputting travel preferences
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
